title: GAIA project for evolutionary AI
content:
GAIA: Genetic Artificial Intelligence Algorithm ✨

example:
compress(text) ; say progP() = text ; and len(p) < len(text) ; then p.

n 2 1
fact( n c a ) ; when domain error n < 0 ; err.
fact( n c a ) ; when count c < n ; recur as fact( n ( c + 1 ) ( a * c ) ).
fact( n c a ) ; when count c = n ; recur as fact( n ( c + 1 ) ( a * c ) ).
fact( n c a ) ; final count c > n ; answer is a.
